Uses of Package
neqsim.process.automation

Packages that use neqsim.process.automation
Package
Description
neqsim.process.automation
Stable automation API for programmatic interaction with running NeqSim process simulations.
neqsim.process.processmodel
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.automation used by neqsim.process.automation
    Class
    Description
    AutomationDiagnostics
    Provides self-diagnosis, fuzzy matching, and error-recovery capabilities for the ProcessAutomation API.
    AutomationDiagnostics.DiagnosticResult
    A diagnostic result returned when an operation fails, containing the error analysis, closest suggestions, and auto-correction attempt.
    AutomationDiagnostics.ErrorCategory
    Classification of automation errors for structured remediation.
    AutomationDiagnostics.OperationRecord
    Tracks a single automation operation for learning.
    AutomationDiagnostics.PhysicalBound
    Represents physical bounds for a property value.
    AutomationDiagnostics.ScoredName
    Helper for sorting names by match score.
    ProcessAutomation.ResolvedUnit
    Holds a resolved unit and its address prefix for variable naming.
    SimulationVariable
    Describes a single variable exposed by a unit operation in a process simulation.
    SimulationVariable.VariableType
    Variable access type.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.automation used by neqsim.process.processmodel
    Class
    Description
    ProcessAutomation
    Provides a stable, string-addressable automation API for interacting with a running NeqSim ProcessSystem or ProcessModel.
    SimulationVariable
    Describes a single variable exposed by a unit operation in a process simulation.
